scripts.build: npx remotion render src/index.ts MainVideo out/video.mp4 --concurrency=4
scripts.build:shorts: npx remotion render src/index.ts ShortsVideo out/shorts.mp4 --concurrency=4
scripts.build:all: npx remotion render src/index.ts MainVideo out/video.mp4 --concurrency=4 && npx remotion render src/index.ts ShortsVideo out/shorts.mp4 --concurrency=4
